title: Run Record
description: One record per (prompt x system) execution. Append-only: never overwrite. Stored as individual JSON files in eval/runs/ or appended to a JSONL file. Outputs are stored VERBATIM. No editing, no post-processing, no scoring.

run_id.description: Unique ID for this single execution, e.g. P04__A-vanilla__2026-06-06T14-22-01Z

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 of when the run executed

generation_model_version.description: Exact model string used for generation, captured at run time, e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001

config_hash.description: Hash of this system's entry in systems.config.json at run time. Lets you detect if config changed between runs.

document_set_hash.description: For Experiment B only: hash of the resolved document set both B systems consumed. Must be identical across B-research and B-vanilla for a comparison to be valid. Null for Experiment A.

output.description: Stored VERBATIM as the system produced it.

answer.description: The prose answer, exactly as produced. No edits.

cited_sources.description: Sources the system cited or retrieved. May be empty for vanilla systems that don't cite.

extracted_data.description: Experiment B only. The structured representation the system built from raw PDFs, so the expert can inspect extraction quality. Null for Experiment A and for B-vanilla if it does no extraction.

retrieved_chunk_ids.description: Optional: IDs/indices of chunks or memos retrieved, for your own miss-detection against prompts.json reference_key. Never shown to expert.

error.description: If the run failed, the error. A failed run is still recorded, never silently dropped.
